goal: Stand up the GitHub Releases distribution pipeline per decision gad-188 #1 ('NO npm publishing ever — we ship from GitHub releases of github.com/MagicbornStudios/get-anything-done'). GAD is PRIVATE code not intended for public npm. Operator has corrected this 20+ times. Overlaps with task 44-38 (44-28.B5) which rewrites /gad-update from 'npm view/install' to 'gh release download <tag> + tarball unpack + bin/install.js'. Current build pipeline: scripts/build-bun-release.mjs uses bun build --compile (supersedes decision gad-138's Node SEA approach — gad-138 is stale, needs new decision). Ships gad.exe + gad-tui.exe. Scope: (1) confirm gh release pipeline exists — gad-v1.32.0-windows-x64.exe was built per gad-188 impact note '3 days stale and has never been published anywhere', so the publish step itself may be missing, (2) author local operator-triggered release script (scripts/release.mjs) that version-bumps + runs build-bun-release + gh release create + uploads artifacts, (3) rewrite gad-update workflow to pull from GitHub Releases API via gh CLI (tarball OR bun-compiled binary), (4) document install path: curl/wget from release URL OR gh release download + unpack + run bin/install.js, (5) PRIVATE alternatives evaluated + documented: GitHub Packages scoped @magicbornstudios/get-anything-done, private npm registry, direct tarball hosting — pick secondary channel if plugin-capable runtime requires npm-installable, (6) validate end-to-end on a clean machine. Prerequisite for 63-28 plugin manifests (Claude marketplace accepts git-hosted or tarball, not just npm).
